value.setup: Large crude draw with high runs tightens prompt barrels.
value.rationale: US crude fell 3.77 MMbbl to 408.36 with utilization at 96.6% and crude inputs at 17.2 Mbd. Crude exports jumped to 4.46 Mbd while imports dropped to 5.47 Mbd, draining supply. Watch Cushing, which rebuilt 0.71 MMbbl to 19.67 after weeks of draws, as a bearish catalyst.

value.instrument: Distillate Crack vs Gasoline Crack (RBOB/HO switch)
value.setup: Distillate builds while gasoline draws into peak demand.
value.rationale: Distillate stocks rose 2.48 MMbbl to 108.6 despite modest 3.67 Mbd demand, while gasoline drew 2.33 MMbbl to 213.97 with demand climbing to 8.96 Mbd. This divergence favors long gasoline crack over distillate crack. Risk is PADD1 distillate build of 1.6 signaling weak diesel offtake persisting.

value.setup: Jet inventories building faster than distillate on soft demand.
value.rationale: Jet stocks rose 1.72 MMbbl to 48.01, driven by PADD3 build of 1.7, against only 1.78 Mbd of jet demand. The surplus argues for shorting jet relative to heating oil. Catalyst: summer travel could lift jet demand and reverse the build.

value.instrument: PADD1 vs PADD3 Gasoline Cash Basis
value.setup: East Coast refinery outage tightens PADD1 versus Gulf supply.
value.rationale: PADD1 utilization collapsed 8.2 points to 68.3% while PADD3 rose 1.4 to 98.1%, and PADD1 gasoline drew 0.77 MMbbl versus PADD3's 2.19 draw. Weak East Coast runs support long NYH gasoline basis against Gulf. Risk is restart of idled PADD1 capacity normalizing runs.
